channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Farrer By-election Results and Quarantine Measures for Hantavirus-Exposed Cruise Passengers
item.description: In this episode of News Worthy, Ben O'Shea delves into the implications following the historic by-election victory in Farrer by David Farley. National Politics Editor Andrew Greene analyses whether th...

item.title: Alex Cooper Shares Messages Addressing Misunderstanding with Brianna LaPaglia Amid Alix Earle Dispute
item.description: Podcast host Alex Cooper has publicly addressed controversy involving fellow influencers Brianna LaPaglia and Alix Earle. The conflict originated from a TikTok in which Cooper accused Earle of creatin...

item.title: Pakistan’s IT Exports Projected to Reach $4.5-$4.6 Billion This Year
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif was briefed on Monday that Pakistan's information technology sector is showing remarkable growth, with IT exports expected to reach between $4.5 billion and $4.6 billion ...

item.title: Constitutional Court orders parliament to reopen Phala Phala impeachment process
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is currently reviewing his legal avenues following a ruling by South Africa's Constitutional Court, which instructed parliament to reopen impeachment proceedings related to t...

item.title: Starmer faces party pressure following poor local election results
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer is under intense pressure to secure his political future after Labour suffered heavy losses in recent local elections, losing over a thousand councillors and control of...

item.title: APC Screening Panel Disqualifies Fubara Supporters While Clearing Wike Allies in Rivers State
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) in Rivers State don carry out screening for 2027 state assembly primaries, wey result in disqualification of former Speaker Victor Oko Jumbo and 64 other aspirants ...

item.title: Katsina State Approves ₦3.8 Billion Loan to Secure Hajj Slots for 3,890 Pilgrims
item.description: The Katsina State Government under Governor Dikko Radda has approved a ₦3.8 billion loan to secure 3,890 Hajj slots for intending pilgrims from the state for the 2026 pilgrimage to Saudi Arabia. This ...

item.title: E.On to acquire Ovo, expanding its UK customer base to over nine million
item.description: German energy company E.On has announced plans to acquire rival UK energy supplier Ovo, in a move that will significantly expand its presence in the British energy market. Currently serving 5.6 millio...

item.title: MEA Clarifies There Is No India-UAE Evacuation Agreement via Fujairah Port
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) of India has categorically denied recent media reports suggesting that India and the UAE were preparing an agreement to evacuate Indian citizens through Fujairah...

item.title: Passengers Evacuated from Cruise Ship Show Hantavirus Symptoms, Authorities Monitor Others
item.description: Three passengers from the MV Hondius cruise ship have shown signs of hantavirus following a global evacuation effort. A French woman tested positive for the virus and experienced worsening health upon...

item.title: SC Clarifies Equipment Shortage Does Not Define Labor-Only Contracting
item.description: The Supreme Court (SC) has clarified that a contractor’s lack of tools, equipment, or machinery does not automatically make it a labor-only contractor, especially when the contracted work does not req...

item.title: Volcanic Plume from Tonga Eruption Accelerates Methane Breakdown in Atmosphere
item.description: Following the January 2022 eruption of the Hunga Tonga-Hunga Ha'apai underwater volcano, researchers observed an unexpected atmospheric reaction that partially removed methane, a potent greenhouse gas...

item.title: Insights from a Literary Agent on How Writers Are Signed and Typical Author Earnings
item.description: The article is intended to provide an insider perspective from a literary agent on what factors influence the decision to sign a writer and the realities of author earnings. While specific content fro...

item.title: Fifteen Years After Fukushima: Ongoing Challenges and Risks of the Nuclear Disaster
item.description: Fifteen years after the 2011 Great East Japan Earthquake and tsunami, the Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant disaster remains unresolved. The plant's flawed design, operator negligence, and systemi...

item.title: Corey Horsburgh fined for careless high tackle while Simi Sasagi awaits shoulder scan for Canberra Raiders
item.description: Canberra Raiders forward Corey Horsburgh has avoided suspension after being charged by the NRL match review committee following his side's 30-18 loss to the Penrith Panthers. Horsburgh was placed on r...

item.title: Senator Raffy Tulfo Questions DOH on Undersecretary Glenn Baggao's Continued Role in Health Facilities Program Amid Brother's Contracts
item.description: During a Senate hearing on May 11, 2026, Senator Raffy Tulfo questioned Department of Health Secretary Teodoro Herbosa on why Undersecretary Glenn Mathew Baggao remains in charge of the Health Facilit...

item.title: Opposition Criticises PM Modi’s Appeal for Citizens to Conserve Fuel and Curtail Purchases During Iran Conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently urged Indian citizens to adopt responsible lifestyle choices, such as reducing fuel consumption, avoiding non-essential foreign travel, cutting down on gold purch...

item.title: Lime Files for IPO Amid Financial Challenges and Growth Efforts
item.description: Lime, the electric bike and scooter rental company backed by Uber, has officially filed for an initial public offering (IPO) in 2026 after years of anticipation. The company has been showing positive ...

item.title: Iran outlines its demands for peace while Trump rejects proposal
item.description: Iran has clarified that its latest response to the United States’ peace proposal contained legitimate demands, aimed at ending regional conflict and ensuring stability. According to Iranian Foreign Mi...

item.title: Kenya Enacts Tax and Investment Reforms to Boost Foreign Investment
item.description: President William Ruto has signed three important pieces of legislation aimed at making Kenya more attractive to foreign investors and technology companies. The Income Tax Bill, the Special Economic Z...
